---
title: "Part 7：多模态学习"
author: jshn9515
date: 2026-05-05
date-modified: today
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../ch15-vision-language-models/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part7-multimodal-learning
  description: "Part 7: Multimodal Learning"
---
